# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: AI Assistant Enhancements meet Cyberpunk Code Breach Visual Update
- Summary: Showcase the new AI assistant capabilities alongside the Code Breach cyberpunk redesign, highlighting real-time problem-solving help and immersive tower-defense visuals.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-and-code-breach-updates
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assistant-and-code-breach-updates
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-20-codegrind-ai-assistant-and-code-breach-updates.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind blends Azure OpenAI-powered AI assistance with a refreshed Code Breach cyberpunk experience, delivering guided problem solving in a dynamic coding game. Users get model-switching conversations, persistent chats, and enhanced in-game visuals that visualize programming concepts as defensive towers.
- CTA: Try the updated CodeGrind AI assistant now and explore the Code Breach redesign in action.
- Visual brief: Static hero-style banner showing a code editor mockup on one side and a cyberpunk Code Breach tower-defense scene on the other, with glowing towers representing ForLoop, WhileLoop, and IfCondition, and an AI chat bubble overlay highlighting problem-solving guidance.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
